title: lithospermum bungei
intro: Lithospermum bungei, also known as Chinese gromwell or Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-viral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Lithospermum bungei can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effectiveness.
